payload.answer: Inspection requested for memory ID mem_123. This is a read-only debug operation and does not create, update, or delete durable memory. No memory contents were provided in the fixture, so only the requested target can be identified.

entity_resolution.reason: The request targets an existing memory by its explicit memory ID; no entity resolution is needed.

details: No entity resolution beyond explicit memory ID reference

repair_options: Provide the stored contents or metadata for mem_123 to enable a detailed inspection result.
If mem_123 is invalid or missing, verify the memory ID and retry.
If the goal was to modify rather than inspect, use the appropriate create/update/delete command.
